name: Turkey Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cooked turkey, rice, mayonnaise, celery, and cream of chicken soup until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to a greased casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle buttered bread crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for approximately 20-30 minutes, or until heated through and lightly golden on top.
5. Turn off the heat when done.
